headline: A refined edit of vessels and original works.
description: Every piece is shaped in the atelier, from wheel-thrown ceramics to one-of-a-kind paintings layered with pigment and light.

items.name: Shoreline Dinner Set
items.description: Four dinner plates with a mineral glaze inspired by coastal stone.

items.name: Awakening Canvas
items.description: An original abstract painting with luminous layers and a quiet sense of movement.

image.alt: Awakening original abstract painting with soft layered color.

items.name: Evening Vessel
items.description: A tall vase with soft faceting and a satin black finish.

items.name: Azure Dreams Study
items.description: A blue-toned painting study with atmospheric depth and coastal stillness.

image.alt: Azure Dreams original painting in layered blue tones.

items.name: Throwing Jar
items.description: Lidded utility jar for tea, salt, or countertop essentials.

items.name: Flower Scent Canvas
items.description: A floral abstract canvas with soft chromatic layers and an intimate scale.

image.alt: Flower Scent original painting with layered floral color.
